title: Cannot login after password reset
description: User gets invalid token message after clicking reset link.
resolution_summary: Expired reset link. User requested new link and logged in.

title: OTP not received for MFA
description: User cannot receive OTP on registered mobile number.
resolution_summary: MFA method updated after number verification.

title: Admin page permission denied
description: Manager cannot open admin settings page after role change.
resolution_summary: Role cache cleared and session refreshed.

title: Wrong role assigned to user
description: User sees staff menu instead of manager menu.
resolution_summary: Correct role assigned and audit log checked.

title: Invoice total is higher than expected
description: Customer says current invoice includes unexpected usage charge.
resolution_summary: Usage line item explained and discount expiry confirmed.

title: Payment failed but bank debited amount
description: Customer paid invoice but portal shows payment failed.
resolution_summary: Gateway status reconciled and transaction marked successful.

title: Production API down for all users
description: All users receive 503 errors from production API.
resolution_summary: Service restarted after failed deployment rollback.

title: Dashboard loading very slowly
description: Dashboard takes more than 30 seconds during business hours.
resolution_summary: Slow query optimized and index added.

title: Container not starting after release
description: New container exits immediately in staging deployment.
resolution_summary: Missing environment variable added to deployment config.

title: Migration failed in staging
description: Database migration fails due to duplicate key constraint.
resolution_summary: Duplicate records cleaned and migration rerun.

title: Uploaded data not visible
description: CSV import says complete but records are missing in dashboard.
resolution_summary: Rejected row file showed validation failures.

title: Duplicate customer records created
description: Retry import created duplicate records for same customer.
resolution_summary: Batch deduplication applied using external id.

title: Suspicious login from unknown country
description: User reports login alert from unknown location.
resolution_summary: Account locked and sessions revoked.

title: Tenant data visible to another tenant
description: User sees records from a different company account.
resolution_summary: Access disabled and tenant filter defect escalated.

title: Webhook delivery stopped
description: CRM webhook events are no longer reaching our endpoint.
resolution_summary: Callback URL was expired and updated.

title: Vendor API rate limit hit
description: Integration is failing due to too many requests to vendor API.
resolution_summary: Retry backoff and caching added.

title: Report total mismatch
description: Monthly spend report does not match exported source data.
resolution_summary: Timezone and status filters corrected.

title: Scheduled report not emailed
description: Daily summary email did not reach managers today.
resolution_summary: SMTP failure fixed and report resent.

title: Profile update not saving
description: User changes phone number but save button returns validation error.
resolution_summary: Mandatory country code field added by user.

title: Unable to upload receipt file
description: Expense receipt upload fails for a 15 MB file.
resolution_summary: File size limit explained and upload limit updated.

title: Login locked after multiple attempts
description: User is locked out after failed password attempts.
resolution_summary: Account unlocked after verification.

title: User cannot access project workspace
description: Team member cannot see assigned project workspace.
resolution_summary: Workspace membership was missing and added.

title: Tax not applied correctly on invoice
description: Invoice tax value does not match customer region.
resolution_summary: Billing region was incorrect and corrected.

title: Frequent timeouts on search API
description: Search API times out during peak load.
resolution_summary: Query optimized and timeout threshold reviewed.

title: Release rollback required
description: Latest release caused errors in staging validation.
resolution_summary: Rollback completed and defect logged.

title: Imported file shows wrong row count
description: Import summary says 100 rows but only 84 are visible.
resolution_summary: Rejected rows were hidden due to validation failures.

title: Possible data exposure through export
description: Export file contains fields user should not see.
resolution_summary: Export disabled until permission filter was fixed.

title: Payment webhook signature invalid
description: Payment updates fail due to signature verification error.
resolution_summary: Webhook secret refreshed and validation fixed.

title: Dashboard numbers stale
description: Analytics dashboard does not update after new records are approved.
resolution_summary: Aggregation job restarted.

title: Search cannot find record with special character
description: Search fails when customer name contains apostrophe.
resolution_summary: Search parser escaped special characters.
